narrative:
Westlake-02-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 971 registered voters, with 57.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.4%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.6 percentage points.
